examples.title: Complement Algorithm
examples.description: A pseudocode algorithm for finding the complement of a binary number
examples.code:
FUNCTION complement(binaryNumber)
  flippedBits = FLIP(binaryNumber)
  IF R's THEN
    RETURN flippedBits + 1
  ELSE
    RETURN flippedBits
END FUNCTION
examples.explanation: This algorithm takes a binary number as input and returns its complement.

examples.title: Complement Program
examples.description: A C program for finding the complement of a binary number
examples.explanation: This program takes a binary number as input and prints its complement.
